channel.title: Inception on the diary of amuldotexe
channel.description: Recent content in Inception on the diary of amuldotexe

item.description: allow yourself to be happy allow good things to happen to you allow good feelings to stay in you allow the anger to leave you via your breath & sweat allow the regrets to bid goodbye to you iykwim

Hypothesis: Few of us learn to laugh at our mistakes I mean, unless the mistake caused someone severe hurt, there’s no use being bitter with yourself even for a couple of seconds isn’t it? how does it help? let’s laugh a little when we make some mistakes next time as we inevitably will observe don’t judge iykwim
